reason: Product requirements: full bcachefs alignment (gaps 1-9), acceptance criteria, 9 requirements
Technical design: bcachefs-aligned recovery passes (bitmask scheduling + trailing_zeros), journal overlay (sorted Vec + gap buffer), overlay bypass, clean section, blacklist, gap detection
Implementation plan: 5 phases (P1 framework, P2 flush+blacklist+clean, P3 persistence, P4 overlay, P5 gap+dynamic), test strategy, file change manifest
bcachefs recovery 主入口：bch2_fs_recovery()、bch2_run_recovery_passes_startup()、journal_read + journal_replay 流程
bcachefs pass 类型定义：RecoveryPass 枚举、PASS_ALWAYS/PASS_UNCLEAN flags、recovery_pass_will_run()
bcachefs pass 调度实现：bch2_run_recovery_passes()（位掩码调度 + __ffs64 迭代）、pass_done = max(pass_done, pass）、passes_complete 位掩码
bcachefs pass 定义表：x(alloc_read, 0, PASS_ALWAYS)、x(set_may_go_rw, 8, PASS_ALWAYS|PASS_SILENT)、x(journal_replay, 9, PASS_ALWAYS)
bcachefs recovery 运行时类型：pass_done（标量）、passes_complete（位掩码）、current_pass、rewound_from/to
bcachefs journal_keys 类型定义：struct journal_keys（nr/size/data/gap 预分配数组 + gap buffer）、struct journal_key（journal_seq_offset、btree_id、level、overwritten flag）
bcachefs fs 初始化流程：bch2_fs_open → __bch2_fs_start → bch2_fs_recovery → bch2_fs_read_write 调用链
bcachefs journal 实现：journal read/write/blacklist 流程
